name: site-ops
description: Site operations — visual compliance checks against the Heritage v2.1 design system, build-verify screenshots after UI edits, and skill-package curation for the universal-skills-marketplace.

interface.shortDescription: Visual compliance, deploy gates, and skill-package curation
interface.longDescription: Site Ops bundles the visual-audit skill, the build-verify agent (in-session Chrome screenshots with Heritage v2.1 token checks), and the skill-package-curator agent (validates .skill manifests and wires them into the universal-skills-marketplace). Use this plugin when editing UI, preparing a deploy, or publishing a skill package. Imports the production skills and agents from the Blaze Sports Intel workspace.
interface.defaultPrompt: Run a Heritage v2.1 visual audit on blazesportsintel.com/scores and flag any banned text or broken tokens.
